mapper.sql: product_order_number, team_number, name_pk, operate_status, ticked, ticked_time, ticked_user, ticket_cost, status, pk, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT A.*, B.name, B.id, B.sex, B.cellphone_A, B.cellphone_B, B.id_file, B.passport_file, B.name_index, B.chairman, B.order_pk, B.lock_flg, B.delete_flg, B.id_type, B.as_adult, C.departure_date, C.product_name, C.product_model, C.days, C.product_pk, C.product_manager_number FROM product_order_name A LEFT JOIN sale_order_name_list B ON A.name_pk = B.pk LEFT join product_order C ON A.product_order_number = C.order_number WHERE A.pk in
#{item}

SELECT A.*, B.name, B.id, B.sex, B.cellphone_A, B.cellphone_B, B.id_file, B.passport_file, B.name_index, B.chairman, B.order_pk, B.lock_flg, B.delete_flg, B.id_type, B.as_adult, C.departure_date, C.product_name, C.product_model, C.days, C.product_pk, C.product_manager_number FROM product_order_name A LEFT JOIN sale_order_name_list B ON A.name_pk = B.pk LEFT join product_order C ON A.product_order_number = C.order_number WHERE A.team_number = #{team_number,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT B.*, C.name, C.id, C.sex, C.cellphone_A, C.cellphone_B, C.id_file, C.passport_file, C.name_index, C.chairman, C.order_pk, C.lock_flg, C.delete_flg, C.id_type, C.as_adult, C.age FROM product_order_name_air_need A LEFT JOIN product_order_name B ON A.name_pk = B.pk LEFT JOIN sale_order_name_list C ON B.name_pk = C.pk where A.need_pk =#{need_pk,jdbcType=CHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into product_order_name
product_order_number,
team_number,
name_pk,
operate_status,
ticked,
ticked_time,
ticked_user,
ticket_cost,
status,
pk,
create_user,
update_user,
create_time,
update_time,
#{product_order_number,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{team_number,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{name_pk,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{operate_status,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{ticked,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{ticked_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ticked_user,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ticket_cost,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{status,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{pk,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{create_user,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{update_user,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{create_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{update_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update product_order_name
product_order_number = #{product_order_number,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
team_number = #{team_number,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name_pk = #{name_pk,jdbcType=CHAR},
operate_status = #{operate_status,jdbcType=CHAR},
ticked = #{ticked,jdbcType=CHAR},
ticked_time = #{ticked_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ticked_user = #{ticked_user,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ticket_cost = #{ticket_cost,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
status = #{status,jdbcType=CHAR},
pk = #{pk,jdbcType=CHAR},
create_user = #{create_user,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{update_user,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{update_time,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where pk = #{pk,jdbcType=CHAR}
